title: Strategic Partnership Diligence
objective: Determine whether to enter a bounded AI infrastructure partnership pilot.

missionContract.decisionToSupport: Whether to authorize a bounded 30-day sandbox pilot
missionContract.allowedEnvironment: partner-owned sandbox; synthetic or non-sensitive data only

governedDecisionState.decision: Proceed with a 30-day sandbox pilot - subject to four closing conditions.
governedDecisionState.summary: The evidence supports strategic and technical fit for a reversible pilot. Production deployment, broad data access and auto-renewal remain blocked.
closingConditions: Independent security attestation or equivalent control evidence
Rollback rehearsal, capped budget and explicit termination rights

claims.evidenceOrLimitation: Architecture map, API compatibility test and sandbox integration plan.

claims.claim: Security controls are adequate for production
claims.evidenceOrLimitation: Control narrative exists; independent attestation and incident evidence are missing.

claims.claim: A restricted sandbox can be operated safely
claims.evidenceOrLimitation: No production data, scoped credentials, monitoring and kill switch.
Proposed regions align; complete subprocessor and data-flow map is pending.
Illustrative load-band model and sensitivity analysis.
claims.authorityConsequence: Negotiate price cap and volume breakpoints.

claims.claim: The provider can support enterprise operations
claims.evidenceOrLimitation: Support model documented; two relevant references still required.
Export path exists; contract and technical exit test remain incomplete.
Complementarity map, executive objectives and capability gap analysis.

claims.claim: All legal and regulatory issues are resolved
claims.evidenceOrLimitation: Operational facts mapped; jurisdiction-specific legal review remains outside the system.

claims.claim: A 30-day pilot is reversible and decision-useful
claims.evidenceOrLimitation: Milestones, acceptance tests, day-14 checkpoint and rollback plan.

proofDebt.obligation: Two reference calls with comparable customers
Documented rollback rehearsal and commercial exit

contradictions.statement: Provider markets “production ready,” while independent assurance is not yet supplied.
Low headline price conflicts with higher support and observability costs at enterprise scale.
Fast integration claim conflicts with custom identity and data-residency requirements.

claimBoundary: No external validation or production certification
No legal, financial, tax or investment advice
No achieved AGI, ASI or superintelligence claim
Participant obligations are exclusive, continuing and bound to the acceptance receipt
